case_title: MICHAEL FRANCIS CAMBELL VS. SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS SOTELO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISCHER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: AMANDA FISCHER. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,371.59 FILED BY CAMBELL, MICHAEL FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE AMANDA FISCHER FILED BY CAMBELL, MICHAEL FRANCIS SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE HAS PAID $525 TO THE CREDITOR AS OF TODAY; BALANCE OWED IS $1920.00. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00);THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFULL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS / ADDRESS IS THE SFSU ADMIN. BUILDING / NO OFFICE OR SUITE SPECIFIED / ADDRESS HAS 5 FLOORS AND 30 DIFFERENT ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMBELL, MICHAEL FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED OCT-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMBELL, MICHAEL FRANCIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOTELO, SEAN NARCISCO RAMOS $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,445.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO PLAINTIFF CAMBELL, MICHAEL FRANCIS HEARING SET FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
